title: Primary and Occupational Health Care Staff's Experiences of Supporting Patients' Work Ability 2020-2021
description: The data cover the experiences of Finnish primary and occupational health care staff with patients in need of work ability support and work ability support services. The data consists of eight initial interviews and five final interviews with doctors and nurses. Some interviewees participated in both the initial and final interviews. The data was collected as part of the TYKYTUO (Supporting work ability for longer careers and productivity - Models of action for multiprofessional cooperation) pro
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
